title: Metadata Audit Simulator
description: A single-file, in-browser digital-humanities teaching tool for auditing how gaps and inconsistencies in cultural-heritage metadata drive AI image-generation hallucination. Developed for the ESU 2026 Digital Archives workshop. Initial prototype generated with Google Gemini; developed and extended with Claude (Anthropic).
notes: Built with the assistance of Google Gemini (initial prototype) and Claude, Anthropic (development and extension).
